constraints.name: amount_consistent
constraints.message: Total must equal recognized plus remaining

constraints.name: dates_valid
constraints.message: End date must be after start date

constraints.name: recognized_not_exceed
constraints.message: Recognized amount cannot exceed line amount

value.value: End date must be after start date
